name: io.github.goplasmatic/orion
description: Build and operate declarative REST/Kafka services on Orion: 46 tools over the full admin API.

environmentVariables.name: ORION_SERVER_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the Orion server to manage (e.g. http://localhost:8080)

environmentVariables.name: ORION_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key, if the Orion server has admin authentication enabled
